title: South Korea to spend $1T on more memory chip production and humanoid robots
abstract: South Korea is investing $1 trillion in memory chip production and humanoid robots—yes, you read that right! This isn't just about upgrading your computer; it's preparing to bring robot helpers into homes for tasks and companionship. It’s not just tech upgrades but a full-blown revolution at home!
abstract_zh: 你听过“内存条”涨价吗？那简直小巫见大巫！韩国要砸下1000亿美元，不仅要在内存芯片上大干一场，还打算搞点“人形机器人”的事情。这回，不是让你等着电脑升级了，而是准备给你家也来个科技革命，让家里多一个能干活、陪你聊天的小伙伴呢！
